title: SMACH properties pane for editing state descriptions and transitions
purpose: Provides a UI component for editing SMACH diagram state properties including description and transitions, with utility functions for content detection and parsing.
module_context: Exports interfaces for SmachState and SmachPropertiesPaneProps, utility functions isSmachContent and parseSmachState for SMACH content handling, and the main SmachPropertiesPane React component.

steps.content: Test if the content matches the SMACH diagram pattern using a regular expression.
Return true if the pattern is found, otherwise return false.
Attempt to parse the YAML content into a structured object.
Extract the states section from the parsed diagram.
Look up the specified state name in the states collection.
IF the state is not found, return null.
Extract transitions from the state data and convert them to an array format.
Construct and return a SmachState object with the state name, description, and transitions.
Initialize state for tracking description editing and the current description value.
Reset the description value and editing state when the selected state changes.
IF no state is selected, return null to render nothing.
Render the header with the state name and close button.
Render the description section with edit and save functionality.
Render the transitions section with list of transitions and add/remove controls.
Call the onEditDescription callback with the current description value.
Exit the editing mode for the description.
